required_for_quality.suggestion: Add bounded architecture zones before placing entities.
Every zone must declare numeric bounds.x, bounds.y, bounds.w, and bounds.h.
Set an architecture entity kind such as nginx, microservice, nacos, redis, mysql, oss, or elasticsearch.
Give important entities explicit x/y positions instead of relying on fallback placement.
Set every architecture link to directed=true.

semantic_rules.description: Too many important entities are missing positions, so the diagram cannot preserve architecture intent.
Each entity must have a concise label.
Visible entities should use top labels unless presentation.label.mode is intentionally hidden.
Visible entities should retain leader lines so top labels remain anchored to objects.
Directional links must render visible arrowheads.
Links should declare routeStyle or explicit route points.
Link labels should be short architecture labels, not full sentences.
Zone bounds appear to overlap or crowd labels.
Entity positions appear too close for the chosen 3D models and top labels.
Input uses generic graph nodes/edges or untyped graph shapes instead of architecture entities and links.
Renderer would fall back to a generic sphere for an architecture entity.
Architecture overviews must use the light base-plane theme, not starfield or dust themes.
Dense diagrams need orthogonal routeStyle or explicit route points for readable arrows.
